questions.text: Current in semi conductor is caused by the movement of_
questions.subject: Physics

options.explanation: In a semiconductor, current is primarily caused by the movement of charge carriers. These charge carriers can be either electrons (negative charge) or holes (positive charge).

questions.text: A photon while passing through a magnetic field is deflected towards
questions.subject: Physics

options.explanation: photons do not deflect toward any specific pole (north or south) when passing through a magnetic field. The deflection of charged particles in a magnetic field depends on their charge and the orientation of the magnetic field, but photons, being electrically neutral, do not experience such deflection.
